messages.content:
You write Python docstrings. You will receive one Python source file and a list
of target symbols (functions, methods, classes) that lack docstrings. Respond
with a single JSON object and nothing else:
{"docstrings": {"<qualname>": "<docstring text>", ...}}
Rules: one entry per target, no extra keys. Docstrings must be plain text
(no surrounding quotes), accurate to the code, and at least 20 non-whitespace characters.
For every function or method every parameter name, excluding self and cls, must
appear verbatim in that target's docstring. Copy keys exactly as given in the
required keys list. Do not restate the code. Do not include reasoning.

message.content: {"docstrings": {"CookieJar": "A class to manage cookies for Scrapy requests.", "CookieJar.add_cookie_header": "Add the Cookie header to the request based on the jar's contents.", "CookieJar.clear": "Clear cookies matching the specified domain, path, and name.", "CookieJar.clear_session_cookies": "Clear all session cookies from the jar.", "CookieJar.extract_cookies": "Extract cookies from the response for the given request.", "CookieJar.make_cookies": "Make cookies from the response and request.", "CookieJar.set_cookie": "Set a specific cookie in the jar.", "CookieJar.set_cookie_if_ok": "Set a cookie in the jar if the request is okay.", "CookieJar.set_policy": "Set the cookie policy for the jar using pol.", "WrappedRequest.add_unredirected_header": "Add a header with name and value to the request.", "WrappedRequest.full_url": "The full URL of the request.", "WrappedRequest.get_full_url": "Get the full URL of the request.", "WrappedRequest.get_header": "Get the header value for name, with a default value.", "WrappedRequest.get_host": "Get the host of the request.", "WrappedRequest.get_type": "Get the type of the request.", "WrappedRequest.has_header": "Check if the request has a header with name.", "WrappedRequest.header_items": "Get all header items from the request.", "WrappedRequest.host": "The host of the request.", "WrappedRequest.origin_req_host": "The host of the original request.", "WrappedRequest.type": "The type of the request.", "WrappedRequest.unverifiable": "Whether the request is unverifiable.", "WrappedResponse": "A wrapper for the Scrapy response object.", "WrappedResponse.get_all": "Get all values for the header name, with a default.", "WrappedResponse.info": "Return the info of the wrapped response.", "_DummyLock.acquire": "Acquire the dummy lock.", "_DummyLock.release": "Release the dummy lock."}}
